revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Fuhachimangu]][[ja:府八幡宮]] {{Expand Japanese|府八幡宮}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Fu Hachimangu | native_name = 府八幡宮 | image = Rōmon of Fuhachimangū.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Fu Hachimangu | coordinates = {{coord|34.719917|137.853444}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|lt=Ōjin|ar|الإمبراطور أوجين|arz|الامبراطور اوجين|azb|اوجین (ایمپیراتور)|bn|সম্রাট ওজিন|cs|Ódžin|de|Ōjin|en|Emperor Ōjin|es|Ōjin Tennō|eu|Ōjin enperadorea|fa|امپراتور اوجین|fi|Ōjin|fr|Ōjin|hr|Ōjin|id|Kaisar Ōjin|it|Ōjin|ja|応神天皇|ka|ოძინი|ko|오진 천황|nl|Ojin|pl|Ōjin|pt|Ojin|ru|Император Одзин|sh|Car Ōjin|simple|Emperor Ōjin|sl|Cesar Odžin|sv|Ojin|th|จักรพรรดิโอจิง|tl|Emperador Ōjin|tr|Ōjin (imparator)|uk|Імператор Одзін|uz|Imperator Ōjin|vi|Thiên hoàng Ōjin|yo|Emperor Ōjin|zh_min_nan|Ôzin Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} }} {{nihongo|'''Fuhachimangu'''|府八幡宮}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|fa|معبد هاچیمان|fr|Sanctuaire Hachiman|it|Santuario di Hachiman|ja|八幡宮|simple|Hachiman shrines|vi|Đền thờ thần Hachiman|zh|八幡宮|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11642130|ltq=Q11642130|qid=Q11642130|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 31 ** P155: {{ill|Kokura Shrine|lt=Kokura Shrine|qid=Q135039605|1=Kokura Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11677253|ltq=Q11677253|qid=Q11677253|1=Rokuon Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q386651|ltq=Q386651|qid=Q386651|1=Iwata, Shizuoka}} * {{ill|Tōtōmi Province|lt=Tōtōmi Province|ckb|پارێزگای تۆتۆمی|cs|Tótómi (provincie)|de|Provinz Tōtōmi|en|Tōtōmi Province|eo|Provinco Tōtōmi|es|Provincia de Tōtōmi|fa|ولایت توتومی|fr|Province de Tōtōmi|gl|Provincia de Tōtōmi|id|Provinsi Tōtōmi|it|Tōtōmi|ja|遠江国|ko|도토미국|lt|Tōtōmio žemė|nl|Tōtōmi (provincie)|pt|Província de Tōtōmi|ru|Тотоми (провинция)|simple|Tōtōmi Province|sk|Tótómi|sr|Провинција Тотоми|tr|Tōtōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Тотомі|zh_min_nan|Tôtômi-kok|zh_yue|遠江國|zh|遠江國|qid=Q1048864|1=Tōtōmi Province}} * {{ill|Q6100753|ltq=Q6100753|qid=Q6100753|1=Iwata District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.719917|137.853444}} * {{coord|34.719776|137.853498}} == image (P18) == * Rōmon of Fuhachimangū.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q317997|ltq=Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|Q261637|ltq=Q261637|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181517 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|religious corporation|lt=religious corporation|ja|宗教法人|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == BabelNet ID (P2581) == * 08150663n == postal code (P281) == * 438-0078https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == TripAdvisor ID (P3134) == * 2057596 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1080405005453 == Commons category (P373) == * Fuhachimangu == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039607|ltq=Q135039607|qid=Q135039607|1=Irumino Shrine (Q135039607)}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県磐田市中泉112-1', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Fuhachimangu}} [[JA:府八幡宮]] {{wikidata link|Q11486075}} == Japanese content == {{Otheruses|???? in Iwata City|Kokufu Hachimang? including others|Kokufu Hachimang?}} {{?? |?? = Fuhachimang? |?? = [[File:Fuhachimangu (Iwata), romon.jpg|270px]]
R?mon (Shizuoka Prefecture designated cultural property)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|coord={{coord|34|43|11.7|N|137|51|12.4|E}}}} |??? = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Iwata|Q386651|qid=Q386651|1=Iwata, Shizuoka}} Nakaizumi 112-1 |ISO = JP-22 |??? = 34|??? = 43|??? = 11.7 |??? = 137|??? = 51|??? = 12.4 |?? = {{ill|lt=Emperor ?jin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Honda Wake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor Ch?ai|Q179971|qid=Q179971|lt=Tarashinakahiko-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Chūai}}
{{ill|lt=Empress Jing?|Q232803|qid=Q232803|lt=Okinagatarashihime-no-Mikoto|1=Empress Jingū}} |?? = |?? = former {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=Ken-sha}} |?? = (tradition) during the {{ill|lt=Tenpy?|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} era ({{ill|lt=729|Q23561|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}}-{{ill|lt=748|Q23621|qid=Q23621|1=748}}) |?? = three-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |?? = |??? = |?? = |?? = |????? = top |?? = Japan Shizuoka }} '''Fuhachimang?''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Nakaizumi, {{ill|lt=Iwata|Q386651|qid=Q386651|1=Iwata, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. Under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was a {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=Ken-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Emperor ?jin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Honda Wake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ch?ai|Q179971|qid=Q179971|lt=Tarashinakahiko-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Chūai}} *{{ill|lt=Empress Jing?|Q232803|qid=Q232803|lt=Okinagatarashihime-no-Mikoto|1=Empress Jingū}} === History === It is said to have been established by Prince Sakurai, provincial governor of T?t?mi, during the {{ill|lt=Tenpy?|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} era ({{ill|lt=729|Q23561|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}}-{{ill|lt=748|Q23621|qid=Q23621|1=748}}). The shrine crest is Hidari Mitsudomoe. === Precinct buildings === * Main hall - built in Genna 3 (1617) in the Edo period. Three-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}}. Designated tangible cultural property of Iwata City. * Worship hall and heiden - built in Kan'ei 12 (1635), Edo period. Designated tangible cultural property of Iwata City. * Ch?mon gate - built in the Edo period. Designated tangible cultural property of Iwata City. * R?mon gate - built in Kan'ei 12 (1635), Edo period. Designated tangible cultural property of Shizuoka Prefecture. File:Fuhachimangu (Iwata), honden.jpg|Main hall (Iwata City designated cultural property) File:Fuhachimangu (Iwata), haiden-2.jpg|Worship hall (Iwata City designated cultural property) File:Fuhachimangu (Iwata), nakamon.jpg|Middle gate (Iwata City designated cultural property) File:Fuhachimangu (Iwata), torii.jpg|Torii === Cultural properties === === Shizuoka Prefecture designated cultural properties === * Tangible cultural property ** Fuhachimang? R?mon (building) - built in Kan'ei 12 (1635), Edo period. Designated on February 25, 1955 (Sh?wa 30)[https://www.city.iwata.shizuoka.jp/sports_midokoro/bunkazai/kenshitei/1002054.html Fuhachimang? R?mon] (Iwata City website).[https://www.city.iwata.shizuoka.jp/sports_midokoro/bunkazai/bunkazainitsuite/1002038.html Prefecture-designated cultural properties located in Iwata City] (Iwata City website).. === Iwata City designated cultural properties === * Tangible cultural properties ** Fuhachimang? Ch?mon (building) - built in the Edo period. Designated November 21, 2005 (Heisei 17)[https://www.city.iwata.shizuoka.jp/sports_midokoro/bunkazai/bunkazainitsuite/1002039.html City-designated cultural properties] (Iwata City website).. ** Fuhachimang? Main Hall and Worship Hall with Heiden (buildings) - built in the Edo period. Designated November 21, 2005 (Heisei 17). ** Monk-form Hachiman deity statue (sculpture) - made in the Heian period. Designated November 21, 2005 (Heisei 17). ** Female deity statue (sculpture) - made in the Heian period. Designated November 21, 2005 (Heisei 17). ** Wooden Zuijin statues (sculpture) - made in the Heian period. Designated January 27, 2014 (Heisei 26). ** Ema paintings dedicated by Aki Shikach?shige, 5 pieces (paintings) - breakdown below. Five of six pieces dedicated in Enp? 5 (1677). Designated May 9, 2011 (Heisei 23). *** Colored board painting: hawk and left-leaning pine *** Colored board painting: hawk and right-leaning pine *** Colored board painting: figure riding an ox *** Colored board painting: fighting cock and figure *** Colored board painting: mounted warrior ** Two ema dedicated by Uchida Shigesada (paintings) - breakdown below. Dedicated in Enp? 6 (1678). Designated May 9, 2011 (Heisei 23). *** Colored board painting: Dong Yong *** Colored board painting: Yu Shun ** Zuika H?ran hakury? mirror (craft object) - designated November 21, 2005 (Heisei 17). === Notes === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Kokufu Hachimang?|Q11420856|qid=Q11420856|1=Kokubu-Hachimangu}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Remains of T?t?mi Kokubunji|1=UNKNOWN}} ===External links=== {{Commonscat|Fuhachimangu}} * [http://www.fu-hachimangu.jp/ Fuhachimang?] - official site * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4411002 Fuhachimang?] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office {{?? ?}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Fu Hachimangu]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Fu Hachimangu]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:磐田市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Iwata, Shizuoka]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Shizuoka Prefecture designated tangible cultural property]][[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shizuoka Prefecture designated tangible cultural property]]
